title: salix × wobstii
intro: Salix × wobstii, a hybrid of the willow species, is a plant known for its medicinal properties. It is primarily used for its salicin content, which provides relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × wobstii include reducing arthritic symptoms, alleviating headaches, and helping with menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations often include the bark or leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules for consumption.
